rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CECIE WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/12/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Courtesy copies of the petition and proof(s) of service were not provided, which delayed review. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] It is unclear why this petition was filed. It appears that this settlement agreement was approved in a related case. The petition does not provide any case numbers for the related estates or clearly identify the interested parties and how they are interested parties. The assigned examiner has been unable to find an "850 petition" filed in this case. There were two requests for special notice filed in this case. The chart of purportedly interested parties is not helpful; "Deceased Spouse" or "Beneficiaries and Intestate Heirs" without an indication of who the decedent is is not helpful. There are references to the "Winham estate," but this is the estate of Cecie West. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 4/28/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HAROLD F. POHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/12/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) The inventory and appraisal on file appears to be incorrect. The assets on attachment two appear to be cash assets. If they are not cash assets, they do not appear to have been appraised by a probate referee. In a verified supplement to the petition, please clarify the nature of the assets, or alternatively, file a corrected inventory and appraisal. 2) The instant petition requests distribution of the estate to Geneva Pohl, Charlotte Pohl, and Sophira Pohl, who are Charles F. Pohl's surviving children. Charles F. Pohl survived the decedent and his interest as a beneficiary of the estate vested. Please provide authority for distribution to anyone other than the personal representative of Charles F. Pohl's estate. 3) Please provide authority supporting a waiver of account from anyone other than the personal representative of Charles F. Pohl's estate. 4) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court. Please address the above issues and delivery courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/04/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHRYN E BASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Granted per written order. (Had notice been required, it would have been defective, as instructions for how to appear remotely were not attached to the notice.) Status of closing the estate will be set for 10/12/27. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 10/12/27. Appearance will be required on that status date if no petition has been filed. If the administrator is not represented by another attorney, there will be a conflict.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROL ROTHMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit the will. No appearance required. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 10/05/2027.
